concerns.text: Task ID T024 is duplicated. It appears as 'Integration test for artifact size validation' in Phase 4 (US2) and again as 'Integration test for discrepancy logging' in Phase 5 (US3). This ID collision breaks traceability for FR-004/SC-002 and FR-005/SC-004. One instance must be renumbered (e.g., T025) to ensure every requirement has a unique, addressable task.

Functional Requirement FR-002 mandates generating 'one text log file' in addition to the PDF. While T015 logs to 'reports/build_log.txt', there is no explicit task verifying the existence or content of a distinct 'text log file' artifact as required by FR-002 and US1-Scenario 3. The current tasks focus on PDF validation (T020-T023) but lack a specific validation step for the log file artifact itself.

The plan and spec highlight risks regarding missing TeX distributions and fonts on default runners (Edge Cases, Assumptions). However, no task exists to explicitly install missing fonts or pin the TeX Live version in the CI workflow (T006 only configures the workflow file). This leaves the 'Feasibility' assumption unverified in the implementation, risking build failure on the target platform.
Task T024 is listed as an integration test for User Story 3, but the ID T024 was already used in Phase 4. This is a stale/incorrect ID reference that needs correction to match the unique task list.
